title: Guardrail Content Filtering Flow
interaction_flow: run_text_guardrail() → log.critical(GUARDRAIL BLOCKED) [if not safe] → return False
--- VIDEO GUARDRAIL CHECK (on generated video frames) ---
is_safe_frames() [for each frame sampled @ 2 FPS] → Image.fromarray(frame) → __infer(pil_image)
is_safe_frames() → break early if predicted_class != 0 (unsafe) → return is_safe bool
run_video_guardrail() → log.critical + return None [if not safe]
--- FACE BLUR POSTPROCESSING (only if video passed safety check) ---
RetinaFaceFilter.postprocess() → preprocess_frames(frames) → frames_tensor (RGB→BGR, subtract mean, permute)
RetinaFaceFilter.postprocess() [per batch] → PriorBox(cfg, image_size).forward() → prior_data [first batch only]
RetinaFaceFilter.postprocess() → blur_detected_faces(frames_slice, batch_loc, batch_conf, prior_data, scale)
blur_detected_faces() [per frame] → retinaface_utils.filter_detected_boxes(boxes, scores, confidence_threshold=0.7, nms_threshold=0.4, top_k=5000, keep_top_k=750)
filter_detected_boxes() → np.where(scores > threshold) → argsort top_k → py_cpu_nms(dets, nms_threshold) → return filtered boxes
blur_detected_faces() [per box] → skip if box < min_size(20,20) → blur_utils.pixelate_face(face_roi) → blurred_face
save_video() → imageio.get_writer(filepath, fps) → writer.append_data(frame) per frame → writer.close()
key_relationships: BaseWorldGenerationPipeline (ABC) owns text_guardrail: GuardrailRunner and video_guardrail: GuardrailRunner
GuardrailRunner aggregates safety_models: list[ContentSafetyGuardrail] and postprocessors: list[PostprocessingGuardrail]
guardrail_presets factory creates both GuardrailRunner instances with concrete implementations
RetinaFaceFilter composes RetinaFace (net) and uses retinaface_utils helpers
io_utils provides read_video (returns VideoData) and save_video using imageio/ffmpeg
offload_pattern: When offload_guardrail_models=True: load guardrail → run check → delete + gc.collect() + cuda.empty_cache(). Applies to both text and video guardrail paths.
data_types: VideoData: dataclass with frames: np.ndarray [B,H,W,C], fps: int, duration: int
Video frames flow as np.ndarray throughout guardrail pipeline
Face boxes as np.ndarray from decode_batch (torch.Tensor -> np.ndarray via detach().cpu().numpy())
important_notes: Text guardrail uses Blocklist + LlamaGuard3 in sequence (short-circuit on first failure). Video guardrail: safety check first (VideoContentSafetyFilter), then face-blur postprocessing (RetinaFaceFilter) only if safe. RetinaFace checkpoint: nvidia/Cosmos-Guardrail1/face_blur_filter/Resnet50_Final.pth. VideoSafety checkpoint: nvidia/Cosmos-Guardrail1/video_content_safety_filter/safety_filter.pt. Face blur uses confidence_threshold=0.7, NMS=0.4, top_k=5000, keep_top_k=750, min_face_size=20x20px.
